title: Messages Through Glass
synopsis: A curious small robot discovers a world inside a snow globe where tiny creatures play ice hockey. When Bolt overhears a secret about the championship game, he must find a way to help through handwritten notes passed between worlds.

pages.text:
The tiny piece of paper stuck to the glass. Bolt, a small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels, rolled closer to the snow globe. His mechanical fingers pressed against the cold surface. Inside the globe, snow fell on a perfect miniature world.

A frozen pond sat in the center. Tiny pine trees dotted the edges. Little creatures with hockey sticks skated in circles. They wore red and blue uniforms. The red team had fuzzy ears. The blue team had long whiskers.

'What does the note say?' Bolt wondered aloud. His voice made soft beeping sounds. The creatures inside stopped skating. One with fuzzy ears waved at him.

Bolt's cyan screen flickered with excitement. He had never seen anyone wave from inside a snow globe before. This was perfectly normal, of course. Snow globes always had tiny hockey leagues.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels examines a magical snow globe. Inside the globe, tiny creatures with fuzzy ears and whiskers play ice hockey on a frozen pond surrounded by miniature pine trees. A small piece of paper is pressed against the inner glass. The scene features enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures in shadows, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Robot discovering tiny hockey players inside a snow globe with a note pressed against the glass

pages.text:
The fuzzy-eared creature skated to the glass. It held up the note. Bolt read the tiny writing through his optical sensors:

'Dear Outside Friend,
We need help. Our goalie Cricket hurt her wing. The championship is tomorrow. Coach Whiskers says we will lose for sure. Can you help us find a new goalie?
Yours truly,
Puck (Captain, Red Fuzzies)'

Bolt processed this information. The Red Fuzzies needed a goalie. Cricket was injured. Tomorrow was the championship game. This was a very serious hockey emergency.

He tapped on the glass three times. Puck nodded and skated away. Soon Puck returned with a tiny pencil and fresh paper.

illustration.description: Close-up view showing a small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels reading a tiny note held up by a fuzzy-eared hockey player inside the snow globe. The miniature creature wears a red uniform and holds the paper against the glass from inside. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical atmosphere, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, detailed magical foliage surrounds the scene.
illustration.alt: Robot reading a tiny note from a hockey captain inside the snow globe

pages.text:
Bolt wrote his reply with a very small pencil. His stubby jointed arms moved carefully:

'Dear Puck,
I will help you find a goalie. What makes a good goalie in your world?
Your friend,
Bolt'

He pressed the note against the glass. Puck read it and skated away quickly. The other Red Fuzzies gathered around their captain. They talked with their tiny voices.

Bolt could hear them if he turned his audio sensors to maximum. This was when he heard the secret. Coach Whiskers from the Blue team was talking to someone behind the pine trees.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels writes with a tiny pencil while the Red Fuzzies hockey team gathers around their captain inside the snow globe. The scene shows the frozen pond, miniature pine trees, and tiny hockey players in red uniforms having a team meeting. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Robot writing a note while tiny hockey players have a team meeting inside the snow globe

pages.text:
'The Red Fuzzies will never find a replacement,' Coach Whiskers said. 'Cricket was their best player. Tomorrow we win the Snow Globe Cup for sure.'

'But what if they find someone?' asked another voice.

'Impossible,' said Coach Whiskers. 'No one else in our world can stop a hockey puck like Cricket.'

Bolt's screen-face dimmed with worry. Coach Whiskers did not know about him. Bolt was not from their world. Maybe he could help in a way no one expected.

Puck returned with a new note:

'Dear Bolt,
A good goalie is brave and quick. They must love their team more than winning. Cricket loved hockey but she loved us more. That made her the best.
Hope,
Puck'

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels listens intently to the snow globe while Coach Whiskers (a creature with long whiskers in a blue uniform) talks secretly behind miniature pine trees. The frozen pond shows both red and blue team players, with Puck holding up another note. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures in shadows, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Robot overhearing Coach Whiskers' secret conversation while Puck shows another note

pages.text:
Bolt wrote quickly:

'Dear Puck,
I heard Coach Whiskers. He thinks you cannot find a goalie. But what if your goalie was not from your world? What if someone bigger helped?
Idea,
Bolt'

Puck read the note. His fuzzy ears perked up. He skated to his teammates. They talked and pointed at Bolt. Soon all the Red Fuzzies were nodding.

Puck wrote back:

'Dear Bolt,
Can you fit through our world? You are very big.
Wondering,
Puck'

Bolt studied the snow globe. He was much too large. But his extendable antenna was very thin. It might fit through the small opening at the top.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels examines the top of the snow globe while the Red Fuzzies team excitedly discusses inside. Puck points upward at the small opening while his teammates gather around. The miniature world shows the frozen pond and pine trees. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Robot studying the snow globe opening while excited hockey players point upward from inside

pages.text:
The next day was championship time. Both teams lined up on the ice. The Blue Whiskers looked confident. The Red Fuzzies looked nervous. Coach Whiskers smirked.

'Where is your goalie?' he asked Puck.

'Right here,' said Puck.

Bolt's thin antenna dropped through the opening. It extended down to the goal. At the tip was a tiny paddle attachment. Bolt had built it during the night.

The referee dropped the puck. The game began. Coach Whiskers' team shot hard at the goal. Bolt's antenna moved lightning-fast. Block! Save! Stop!

'This is impossible!' cried Coach Whiskers.

'This is teamwork,' said Puck.

illustration.description: Inside the snow globe championship game with a small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels visible outside while his thin antenna extends through the opening down to the goal with a tiny paddle attachment. Red Fuzzies and Blue Whiskers teams face off on the frozen pond surrounded by miniature pine trees. The antenna blocks a hockey puck while both teams watch in amazement. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Championship hockey game with robot's antenna serving as goalie inside the snow globe

pages.text:
The Red Fuzzies won the game. But something better happened. After the final whistle, Coach Whiskers skated to Puck.

'That was amazing teamwork,' he said. 'Your outside friend helped you find a way.'

'Want to play together next season?' asked Puck. 'All of us?'

Coach Whiskers nodded. 'The Snow Globe Super League. Red and Blue together.'

Bolt received one final note:

'Dear Bolt,
You showed us that teams are bigger than we think. Cricket is better now. She wants to meet you. Thank you for listening and helping.
Friends forever,
Everyone in the Snow Globe'

Bolt's screen-face glowed bright cyan. Sometimes the best secrets are the ones you help fix.

illustration.description: Celebration scene inside the snow globe with a small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels watching happily from outside. Inside, Red Fuzzies and Blue Whiskers teams celebrate together on the frozen pond, with Puck and Coach Whiskers shaking hands/paws. Cricket, a small creature with a bandaged wing, waves at Bolt. The final note is pressed against the glass. Enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures celebrating, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: All the tiny hockey players celebrating together while robot receives a thank you note

metadata.lessonFocus: Working together and including others makes teams stronger

coverPrompt.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels peers into a magical snow globe. Inside the globe, tiny ice hockey players skate on a frozen pond surrounded by miniature pine trees. The scene is rendered in enchanted forest style with glowing mushrooms around the base, fairy lights twinkling, mystical creatures watching from shadows, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere with detailed foliage framing the image.
coverPrompt.alt: Robot examining a magical snow globe with tiny hockey players inside

questions.question: What sport do the tiny creatures play inside the snow globe?
questions.explanation: The Red Fuzzies and Blue Whiskers play ice hockey on the frozen pond inside the snow globe.

questions.question: Why did the Red Fuzzies need help?
choices: Their goalie Cricket hurt her wing
questions.explanation: Cricket, the Red Fuzzies' goalie, hurt her wing and couldn't play in the championship game.

questions.question: What secret did Bolt overhear?
choices: Coach Whiskers thought the Red Fuzzies couldn't find a replacement
questions.explanation: Bolt heard Coach Whiskers say the Red Fuzzies would never find a replacement goalie for Cricket.

questions.question: How did Bolt help as the goalie?
choices: He shrunk down to fit inside
He used his antenna with a paddle attachment
He taught Cricket to play better
questions.explanation: Bolt extended his thin antenna through the opening with a tiny paddle attachment to block shots.

questions.question: What happened after the Red Fuzzies won?
choices: The Blue Whiskers got angry and left
Both teams decided to play together next season
Bolt kept the Snow Globe Cup
questions.explanation: Coach Whiskers and Puck agreed to form the Snow Globe Super League with both teams playing together.
